scripts.check: node --check timeline.js && node --check quaternion-helpers.js && node --check gpu-instance-motion.js && node --check route-state.js && node --check main.js && node --check browser.mjs && node --check capture-hook.mjs && node --check capture.mjs && node --check validation.js && node --check mutation-test.js && node --check shader-identifier-test.mjs && node --check capture-hook-test.mjs && node --check manifest-test.mjs && node --check validate-artifacts.mjs && node --check local-lab-command.mjs
scripts.validate:unit: node validation.js && node shader-identifier-test.mjs && node capture-hook-test.mjs && node manifest-test.mjs
scripts.validate:quick: npm run check && npm run validate:unit
scripts.validate:full: npm run validate:quick && npm run test:mutations && npm run validate:artifacts
